nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: 普洛格山
nodes.summary: 普洛格山是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联3种鸟类，包括呂宋八色鶇、White-browed jungle flycatcher、Luzon water redstart，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Luzon water redstart
nodes.summary: Luzon water redstart（Luzon water redstart，学名 Phoenicurus bicolor），在图谱中标记为近危（NT）物种，已关联3个分布地点节点，常见栖息地包括山地森林，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏、污染。

nodes.name: 污染
nodes.summary: 农药、工业污染与水体污染影响食物链安全。

nodes.name: Maria Aurora, Aurora
nodes.summary: Maria Aurora, Aurora是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Luzon water redstart，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: NT
nodes.summary: NT表示 IUCN 近危等级，当前关联914种鸟类，如帝企鹅、小斑几维鸟、大美洲鸵等914种鸟类。

nodes.name: Northern Sierra Madre Natural Park
nodes.summary: Northern Sierra Madre Natural Park是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联29种鸟类，包括Rufous coucal、Philippine drongo-cuckoo、Philippine hawk-cuckoo等29种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 山地森林
nodes.summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It occurs in a few protected areas such as Northern Sierra Madre Natural Park, Maria Aurora National Park, Balbalasang-Balbalan National Park and Mount Pulag National Park

links.evidence: It occurs in a few protected areas such as Northern Sierra Madre Natural Park, Maria Aurora National Park, Balbalasang-Balbalan National Park and Mount Pulag National Park

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It occurs in a few protected areas such as Northern Sierra Madre Natural Park, Maria Aurora National Park, Balbalasang-Balbalan National Park and Mount Pulag National Park

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: Adjacent habitat includes tropical montane forest, pine forest or just scrub and scattered trees

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: It is threatened by habitat loss

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: Its main threat is habitat degradation caused by pollution of its streams through mining and dumping of trash and agro-chemicals
